Dashboard / Snapshots

Point-in-time snapshots

Atomic backup files of the live database. Use them to inspect what changed since a moment in time, or to roll the engine back to a past state.

Newest first; oldest pruned per MEMOIRS_SNAPSHOT_KEEP.
